results.title: The Wealth Gap Isn’t About Bad Decisions. It’s About What Nobody Taught You, Says OpenCorp CEO
results.description: Key Facts: Australia's financial literacy gap spans all generations, with the average 50-year-old holding around $200,000 in superannuation — well below the $370,000 needed for a comfortable retirement — whilst Australians under 35 hold just 7% of total household wealth. Gen Z is increasingly turning to social media platforms such as TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram ... Continued

results.title: Revino lands $4.8 million grant to expand reusable wine bottle program into California
results.description: An Oregon startup says its reusable bottles can cut carbon emissions by 85% and is working to grow consumer participation across the West Coast.

results.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq leads Wall Street losses as crude oil tops $95; Indian markets likely to open weak
results.description: US markets ended lower as rising oil prices reignited inflation concerns, dragging technology stocks. Asian markets traded mostly higher, while GIFT Nifty signalled a weak opening for Indian equities despite regional strength.
